title: Create item via email needs to capture more fields
excerpt:

posts.author: abi_twenty2 (Abi Huntoon)
posts.cookedHtml:
When an item is created by directly emailing the board, not forwarding an email, only the subject and body are captured. All information from the email, including the sender address and name, should be captured.
Third party integrations like Extract can only work with the information captured in the original email and do not help with this issue.
